question: q05
question_title: 给 Sunshine Company 营销总监的两页信
statement: Write a one- to two-page letter to the Marketing Director of Sunshine Company summarizing your analysis and results.
methods: 把最可信建议压缩为 low-star share、helpfulness-weighted review length 和 descriptor lift 的上市后监测方案。

data_source.official_requirement: THE DATA FILES PROVIDED CONTAIN THE ONLY DATA YOU SHOULD USE FOR THIS PROBLEM.

marketing_director_letter: Letter to the Marketing Director of Sunshine Company: track low-star share, helpfulness-weighted review length, and disappointed/enthusiastic descriptor lift from launch week onward. The official Amazon review files show that the most useful early warning is not the mean rating alone; it is the combination of rating trend, low-rating share, and negative descriptors that other customers find helpful. Sunshine should compare microwave, pacifier, and hair dryer launches against these baselines and investigate product design features whenever low-rating share and broken/disappointed language rise together.

success_failure_signals.method: combine ratings, helpfulness, review text descriptors, and time trend into an interpretable product signal

product_signal_rows.most_confident_tracking_signal: low-rating share plus disappointed descriptor lift
low-rating share plus disappointed descriptor lift
low-rating share plus disappointed descriptor lift

rating_review_measures.method: official TSV review measures: star ratings, helpfulness, review length, verification, and product counts
recommended_tracking_measures: descriptor lift for enthusiastic and disappointed language
